text.tspan: DORA (EU 2022/2554): Operational resilience monitoring, ICT-related incident management, and third-party ICT risk oversight. Tasks 8.1-8.4
fulfil DORA Article 13 continuous monitoring obligations and Article 28 third-party concentration risk reporting requirements.

rect.style: fill: none; stroke-opacity: 0; stroke: white; stroke-width: 15px;
stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round; stroke: none; stroke-width: 2px; fill: none;

path.style: fill: none; stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round; stroke: rgb(34, 36, 42); stroke-width: 2px;

text.style: font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: normal; fill: rgb(34, 36, 42);
text.tspan: OCC 2023-17: Ongoing third-party risk management requires continuous performance monitoring (8.5), root cause analysis of SLA breaches
(8.4), and documented escalation paths. Vendor scorecard reviews must be conducted at frequency defined by DMN-8 Monitoring Cadence

rect.style: fill: none; stroke-opacity: 0; stroke: white; stroke-width: 15px;
stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round; stroke: none; stroke-width: 2px; fill: none;

text.style: font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: normal; fill: rgb(34, 36, 42);
text.tspan: NIST CSF 2.0 (Govern, Identify, Detect, Respond, Recover): Process Mining (8.6) and Benchmark Recalibration (8.8) fulfil NIST CSF Govern
function continuous improvement obligations. Emergency Termination path implements Respond and Recover functions. Knowledge Base
Enrichment (8.7) supports organisational learning per NIST CSF Govern GV.OC-05.
